section_name: Sale of Master Key for Motor Vehicle Ignitions
chapter_title: Sale or Transfer of Motor Vehicles & Master Keys
text:
(a) A person commits an offense if the person sells or offers to sell a master key knowingly designed to fit the ignition switch on more than one motor vehicle.

(b) An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not less than $25 or more than $200.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 728. Sale or Transfer of Motor Vehicles & Master Keys
##### § 728.011 — Sale of Master Key for Motor Vehicle Ignitions

(a) A person commits an offense if the person sells or offers to sell a master key knowingly designed to fit the ignition switch on more than one motor vehicle.

(b) An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not less than $25 or more than $200.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A person commits an offense if the person sells or offers to sell a master key knowingly designed to fit the ignition switch on more than one motor vehicle.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not less than $25 or more than $200.
